---
title: "Projects"
subtitle: "Mathematical work in progress, from first questions to finished work."
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  - id: mn-projects-all
    contents: entries
    sort: "date-modified desc"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 2
    fields: [image, title, description, date-modified]
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    feed:
      items: 20
      type: partial
      title: "Projects from Math Nomad"
---

::: {.content-block .mn-page-lead}
Projects make work in progress visible. Each page records the central question, why it matters, the present state of the work and the writing, videos or resources that grow from it.
:::

::: {.content-block .mn-project-key}
::: {.mn-project-state}
<span class="mn-state-dot mn-state-active"></span>
<strong>Active now</strong>
<span>Active development and regular updates</span>
:::

::: {.mn-project-state}
<span class="mn-state-dot mn-state-exploring"></span>
<strong>Exploring</strong>
<span>Questions taking shape</span>
:::

::: {.mn-project-state}
<span class="mn-state-dot mn-state-paused"></span>
<strong>Paused</strong>
<span>Work retained for a later return</span>
:::

::: {.mn-project-state}
<span class="mn-state-dot mn-state-complete"></span>
<strong>Completed</strong>
<span>Finished work kept as an archive</span>
:::
:::

::: {.content-block .mn-listing-section}
## Current and completed projects

Newest project pages and substantial updates appear first. Status labels show whether a question is active, exploratory, paused or complete.

::: {#mn-projects-all}
:::
:::
